entries.title: Yuji Targets Sukuna And Megumi's Separation

coordinates.label: Sukuna is being pressured by layered allied plans
Megumi remains suppressed inside the vessel state

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: Yuji's final Shinjuku pressure targets Sukuna's separation from Megumi, turning the endgame from simple defeat into a rescue-state problem.
content.injection: In the final Yuji/Megumi push, keep the objective tied to separating Sukuna from Megumi rather than only overpowering Sukuna.
constraints: Do not resolve Megumi's state before the final push context.
antiLore: Do not write Sukuna's final defeat as unrelated to Megumi's vessel state.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.chapterRange: Yuji and Megumi final separation push
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Megumi's Rescue Stays Central To The Final Push

coordinates.label: Megumi's rescue state is central to the aftermath

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: The final push keeps Megumi's rescue central, so Yuji's confrontation with Sukuna remains tied to Megumi's agency and survival-state.
content.injection: When writing the final push or aftermath, preserve Yuji and Megumi's rescue relationship as a core continuity state.
constraints: Do not treat Megumi as narratively irrelevant once Sukuna is weakened.
antiLore: Do not make the final arc only a Sukuna combat scoreboard; Megumi's state is part of the resolution.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Sukuna's Defeat Sets The Final Resolution

coordinates.label: Megumi's rescue state is central to the aftermath

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: Sukuna's defeat marks the final resolution of the main manga conflict and should remain spoiler-gated until the late Shinjuku context.
content.injection: After the Sukuna-defeated anchor, allow final-resolution references to Sukuna's defeat and the survivors' immediate state.
constraints: Before this anchor, do not reveal Sukuna's final defeat.
antiLore: Do not leave Sukuna active in chapter 271 aftermath scenes.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: The Epilogue State Closes Manga Main

coordinates.label: Megumi's rescue state is central to the aftermath

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: The chapter 271 epilogue state closes the primary manga-main Jujutsu Kaisen deck series while leaving sequel, spinoff, anime-only, and guidebook-only material outside this deck.
content.injection: At the epilogue anchor, allow manga-main aftermath references while keeping Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo and non-manga-main material in separate optional decks.
constraints: Do not treat Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo as covered by this manga-main ending deck.
antiLore: Do not mix anime-only, guidebook-only, game, light-novel, or sequel material into the chapter 271 manga-main close.

sourceInfo.title: Chapter 271 aftermath
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.
